title: Holding Back the Tide

{{Quote|I don't know -- I guess I'm just not that interested in Valorum right now. Maybe, like, after he dies?|Reader comment on TriPlanetary's review list|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''''Holding Back the Tide''''' was the autobiography of former [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], published by [[TriPlanetary Press/Legends|TriPlanetary Press]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="HNN" /> After his being saddled with a reputation for ineffectual leadership and getting voted out of [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|office]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Valorum spent several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] and a sizable portion of his wealth working on the [[Book/Legends|book]],<ref name="Republic 61">[[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]]</ref> which was ultimately released by TriPlanetary Press on the same date as another biography, ''[[Gunray On Top]]''. During the first two months of ''Holding Back the Tide''{{'s}} release, it was met with resounding disinterest, and failed to break the threshold of the top 100 sellers. Meanwhile, ''Gunray on Top'', the unauthorized biography of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], rocketed to the top of the bestsellers list, remaining one of the top ten for at least 14 weeks.<ref name="HNN" />

When TriPlanetary questioned a self-described "avid reader" on their decision not to purchase ''Holding Back the Tide'', they stated that they simply weren't interested in the former Chancellor, but that they may be motivated to buy the product after Valorum's death. The sales differences between ''Holding Back the Tide'' and ''Gunray on Top'' were later reported on by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Holding Back the Tide'' was first mentioned in "Valorum & Gunray Bracket Ends of Book Sales," an article posted in the "Life" section of [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]].<ref name="HNN" /> The book was later mentioned by Valorum in [[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]], in which he explains the efforts he put into creating it.
